title: ConventionRecord
description: A single parsed convention entry from a project convention file.

summary.description: Section heading used as the dedup key and display label.

body.description: Full text of the section or paragraph.

file.description: Repo-relative path to the source file.

section.description: H2 heading text, or empty string for paragraph-split records.

line.description: 1-based line number where the section or paragraph starts.

confidence.description: Always 1.0 — convention files are authoritative by definition.
